title: Anti-money laundering (AML) supervision: discussion about fees
body: "HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) is setting out changes to the fees it charges businesses it supervises under the Money Laundering, Terrorist Financing and Transfer of Funds (Information on the Payer) Regulations 2017.  The publications you can read on this page are:    HMRC’s anti-money laundering (AML) supervision fees: proposals for discussion  HMRC’s anti-money laundering (AML) supervision fees: responses and next steps   The discussion ran from 31 July 2025 to 29 August 2025 and is now closed for comment.  "
